name: Aesthetic
text: How aesthetically pleasing is this image? 0 = ordinary or unpleasant. 1 = strikingly beautiful composition and color.

name: Conflict
text: Semantic conflict between elements. 0 = harmonious, expected together. 1 = strongly discordant (e.g. a dog at a wedding ceremony).

name: Tension
text: Tension, ambiguity, unresolved symbolism, or psychological charge that invites further looking. 0 = flat and fully explained. 1 = strongly charged or ambiguous.

name: Story potential
text: Story potential — does the image suggest something happened before, or is about to happen? 0 = static, non-narrative. 1 = strongly narrative.

name: Novelty
text: Novelty — how unusual is this scene relative to everyday images? 0 = entirely typical. 1 = highly unusual or rarely-seen.

name: Color harmony
text: Color harmony of the image. 0 = clashing or muddy colors. 1 = harmonious, well-chosen color relationships.

name: Mystery
text: Mystery — does the image conceal information or invite speculation? 0 = fully revealed. 1 = strongly enigmatic.

name: Decisive moment
text: Decisive moment — is this a peak instant of action or emotion (Cartier-Bresson sense)? 0 = mundane non-moment. 1 = clearly a peak instant.

name: Frame within frame
text: Frame within a frame — does a doorway, window, mirror, or aperture inside the image frame its subject? 0 = no internal frame. 1 = a clear frame-within-frame composition.
